title: Homology Modelling of Pacer RH domain in SWISS-MODEL
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4cing","text":"Using the Rubicon RH - Rab7 crystal structure as a template (6wcw)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: In Swiss Model, > start new modelling project > upload target sequence. Here, used the human Pacer (RUBCNL) sequence acquired from uniprot: >sp|Q9H714|PACER_HUMAN Protein associated with UVRAG as autophagy enhancer OS=Homo sapiens OX=9606 GN=RUBCNL PE=1 

Search should yield a top hit corresponding to the Alphafold model of Pacer, and subsequent hits represent using the Rubicon RH domain as a template (6wcw). Select the hit that aligns Pacer to the Rubicon structure (6wcw), and > build model. From here, the file can be downloaded as a PDB and used in downstream modelling steps.
>Open Pymol >open downloaded Pacer homology model >fetch rubicon-rab7 dimer crystal structure by typing "fetch 6wcw" in the command line
>Align Rubicon crystal structure and Pacer homology model using the "align" command.
>Delete rubicon monomer, and expansion binding site between the pacer homology model and rab7. Focus on S72 of Rab7
creator: Dan Tudorica
